title: Crypto Payment Integration for Static Sites: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: You're a digital creator based in Nigeria, and you're tired of PayPal's 21-day hold period on your earnings. The same frustration applies to Gumroad's payout delays, which can take up to 14 days. Meanwhile, USDT settlement speed is still a concern, especially when it comes to converting it into local currency like the Nigerian naira. This is especially true for creators who rely on peer-to-peer conversions in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, which often come with high exchange rates and fees. It's time to explore alternative crypto payment integrations that don't require PayPal or other restrictive platforms.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Crypto payment integration for static sites refers to the process of enabling online transactions for digital products through blockchain-based payment systems. This technology allows creators to bypass traditional payment processors like PayPal, which often impose restrictions on countries, currencies, or product types. By using a crypto payment integration, creators can receive payments directly from buyers in their preferred cryptocurrency, such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT, without incurring excessive fees or delays.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind crypto payment integration involves a combination of frontend wallet integration, multi-chain QR code generation, and live price feeds. This enables buyers to pay for digital products using their preferred cryptocurrency, while creators receive the payment in their preferred currency or cryptocurrency. For example, with Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), creators can integrate a multi-chain QR code into their static site, allowing buyers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and over 300 other coins. The payment is then verified and settled in real-time, eliminating the need for intermediaries like PayPal.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built specifically for digital creators in restricted countries or with limited access to traditional payment processors. It's perfect for creators selling ebooks, courses, art, music, software, fonts, presets, and other digital products to a global audience. With crypto payment integration, creators can focus on creating and selling their products without worrying about payment restrictions or delays. Whether you're based in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, or anywhere else, this technology gives you the freedom to receive payments directly from your buyers.
Crypto payment integration is the key to bypassing traditional payment processors and receiving payments directly from your buyers.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components of crypto payment integration include a secure frontend wallet, multi-chain QR code generation, and live price feeds. These components work together to enable fast, secure, and seamless transactions between buyers and creators. For example, with Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), creators can integrate a wallet that supports multiple cryptocurrencies, allowing buyers to pay in their preferred currency. The QR code is then generated based on the buyer's selection, ensuring that the payment is processed correctly and efficiently.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using crypto payment integration for your static site, follow these steps: First, integrate a secure frontend wallet into your site using a tool like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99). Next, generate a multi-chain QR code that allows buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. Finally, configure live price feeds to ensure that the payment is processed correctly and efficiently. This will enable you to receive payments directly from your buyers and focus on creating and selling your digital products without worrying about payment restrictions or delays.
